headline: PPL Corporation Trades Above 50 & 200-Day SMAs: How to Play the Stock?
summary: PPL trades above its 50 and 200-day SMAs as data center demand, a $23B infrastructure plan and ongoing cost cuts support growth and margin expansion.

headline: NextEra Surges Past Industry Over a Year: How to Play the Stock?
summary: NEE stock has jumped 28.7% in a year, beating utilities and the S&P 500 as clean energy demand, rate cuts and heavy investment fuel growth.

headline: Flowserve Appoints Brian Savoy to Board of Directors
summary: DALLAS, March 16, 2026--Flowserve Corporation (NYSE:FLS), a leading provider of flow control products and services for the global infrastructure markets, announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Brian Savoy as a member of the Board of Directors, and appointed him to the Audit Committee and Technology, Innovation and Risk Committee, effective March 16, 2026.

raw.headline: Flowserve Appoints Brian Savoy to Board of Directors

headline: Duke Energy Carolinas Deal Tests Regulatory Support For Efficiency And Growth
summary: Duke Energy has reached a settlement agreement to combine Duke Energy Carolinas and Duke Energy Progress operations in South Carolina. The proposed combination is intended to deliver customer savings and operational efficiencies across the state. The settlement is subject to review and approval by South Carolina regulators before any changes take effect. For investors tracking NYSE:DUK, this settlement is a new development in the story of one of the largest regulated utilities in the US...
